query:
SELECT id, name, discoveryStatus,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = projects.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
FROM projects
WHERE id IN (120240, 1200018, 1200067, 1260002, 120181, 1200063, 60024, 720027, 1200045, 1260012);
